Calderwood Partners LLCwww.calderwoodpartners.com
May 8, 2008
Linda Gallegos
Chief Financial Officer
Hughes Group
Re: Operating Model Redesign for Hughes Group
Dear Ms. Gallegos:
This letter records the terms on which we will redesign the operating model of Hughes Group. It follows
our meetings this spring and the materials your office sent afterward. It sets out what we will do, how we
will staff it, what we will need from you, and the commercial terms that govern the work. Once you have
countersigned and returned it, this letter is the agreement between us and it supersedes anything said before
it.
Scope of the Engagement
The engagement addresses how the company is organized to run: its reporting structure, the way decisions
are made and by whom, the accountabilities that sit with each layer, and the cost that structure carries. We
will produce three things. The first is a diagnostic of the current operating model, built from your
organization charts, your management accounts, and interviews with the leaders who run the business day
to day. The second is a target operating model: a structure, a set of decision rights, and the governance to
support them, designed for where you are taking the company, not for where it has been. The third is an
implementation roadmap that sequences the change and identifies where the return is largest.
Certain matters sit outside this engagement and are available separately if you want them. We will
recommend changes to roles and headcount; we will not carry them out, and the decisions on people remain
yours. Systems selection and implementation, tax structuring, and legal reorganization are not within our
scope. Where our work touches a question we are not engaged to answer, we will say so and stop, instead
of guessing at it.
How We Will Work
We begin with your own figures and your own charts, not with a template carried in from another company.
In the first weeks we will map the current structure, interview the leadership team, and build a cost baseline
that ties to your management accounts, so that every number we later put in front of you can be traced back
to one you already recognize. From that base we design the target model and test it against the demands the
Calderwood Partners LLC
Page 1 of 4

business will place on it. We bring a point of view and we will state it plainly; we do not hand you a menu
of options and ask you to do the designing.
The Team
Jason Torres, Principal, leads the engagement and is your day-to-day contact. He is responsible for the
design work and for what we present to you. Brenda Rodriguez, Senior Consultant, leads the cost and
organization analysis and will run the data exchange with your finance staff; she is the person to reach on
the management accounts and the reconciliations. I review the analysis and the recommendation before
either reaches you, as I do with everything that leaves this office. We do not change the people on your
engagement without telling you first.
Fees and Commencement
Our fee and the basis on which it is calculated are set out on the signature page, which our respective
counsel have executed separately, and they are not restated here. We invoice monthly for the work
performed in the preceding month, payable within thirty days of the invoice date. Work outside the scope
described above is not undertaken on assumption; if you ask for something this letter does not cover, we
will quote it and wait for your written authorization before we begin. Work commences on May 18, 2008,
subject to your countersignature and to our receiving the current organization charts, the last two years of
management accounts, and access to the leaders we will need to interview.
Term and Termination
This agreement takes effect on the date of your signature below and continues until the roadmap has been
delivered and our final invoice paid. Either party may end it on thirty days' written notice to the other. On
termination you will pay us for the work performed and the expenses incurred through the effective date,
and we will deliver our work product in the state it then stands, with a written note of what remains
unfinished. An unfinished diagnostic is not a recommendation and should not be relied on as one.
Confidentiality
We will hold the information you give us in confidence and use it only for this engagement. Access is
limited to the team named above and to those in our office whose work requires it. We will not disclose
your information to anyone outside the firm without your written consent, except where a court or a
regulator with jurisdiction compels it, and in that event we will tell you first if we are free to. Our work
product is prepared for your management and is not to be used on another matter without our written
consent. This obligation survives the end of the engagement.
Limitation of Liability
Our liability to you arising out of this engagement, whether framed in contract or in tort, will not exceed the
total fees you pay us under it, except in the case of our fraud or willful misconduct. Neither of us will be
Calderwood Partners LLC
Page 2 of 4

liable to the other for indirect or consequential loss, including lost profits, whether or not the possibility
was known. Our analysis rests on the accuracy of the information you furnish; where that information
proves materially wrong, the consequences of the error are not ours to carry, though we will tell you
promptly when we see reason to doubt what we have been given.
Governing Law
This agreement is governed by the laws of the state in which our principal office is located, without regard
to its conflict-of-laws rules. Before either of us commences proceedings, we will attempt to resolve any
dispute by discussion between senior representatives of the two parties. This letter and its signature page
are the entire agreement between us on their subject, and either may be amended only in writing signed by
both of us.
If these terms reflect your understanding, please sign both copies where indicated, keep one for your file,
and return the other to this office. If any part of them does not, telephone me and we will settle it before
you sign. We are glad to be doing this work with Hughes Group, and we will be ready to start the
interviews as soon as the letter is back.
Very truly yours,
Calderwood Partners LLC
Page 3 of 4

Fixed professional fee, as executed: $40,500
Julie Ramsey
Managing Principal
Date: May 8, 2008
Linda Gallegos
Chief Financial Officer, Hughes Group
Date: May 8, 2008
Calderwood Partners LLC
